'''âj-m-y''' ('''kajamay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umount|umount]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umount|umount]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-m-y
|-
! Lemma
| kajamay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijamay|thijamay]] || [[word:jijamay|jijamay]] || [[word:shijamay|shijamay]] || [[word:kijamay|kijamay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujamay|thuthujamay]] || [[word:jujujamay|jujujamay]] || [[word:shushujamay|shushujamay]] || [[word:kukujamay|kukujamay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujamay|thujamay]] || [[word:jujamay|jujamay]] || [[word:shujamay|shujamay]] || [[word:kujamay|kujamay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujamay|thujamay]] || [[word:jujamay|jujamay]] || [[word:shujamay|shujamay]] || [[word:kujamay|kujamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejamay|thejamay]] || [[word:jejamay|jejamay]] || [[word:shejamay|shejamay]] || [[word:kejamay|kejamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojamay|thothojamay]] || [[word:jojojamay|jojojamay]] || [[word:shoshojamay|shoshojamay]] || [[word:kokojamay|kokojamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojamay|thojamay]] || [[word:jojamay|jojamay]] || [[word:shojamay|shojamay]] || [[word:kojamay|kojamay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojamay|thojamay]] || [[word:jojamay|jojamay]] || [[word:shojamay|shojamay]] || [[word:kojamay|kojamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjamay|thĂŠjamay]] || [[word:jĂŠjamay|jĂŠjamay]] || [[word:shĂŠjamay|shĂŠjamay]] || [[word:kĂŠjamay|kĂŠjamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajamay|thathajamay]] || [[word:jajajamay|jajajamay]] || [[word:shashajamay|shashajamay]] || [[word:kakajamay|kakajamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajamay|thajamay]] || [[word:jajamay|jajamay]] || [[word:shajamay|shajamay]] || [[word:kajamay|kajamay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajamay|thajamay]] || [[word:jajamay|jajamay]] || [[word:shajamay|shajamay]] || [[word:kajamay|kajamay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajamay|shajamay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajamay|goshajamay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajamay|gokishajamay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajamaynĂŒ|shajamaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajamaynknĂŒ|goshajamaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamaynĂŒ|gokishajamaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajamayshĂ«|shajamayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajamaynkshĂ«|goshajamaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajamayshĂ«|gokishajamayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamayro|shajamayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamaynkro|goshajamaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamayro|gokishajamayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamaymu|shajamaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamaynkmu|goshajamaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamaymu|gokishajamaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajamaysher|shajamaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajamaynksher|goshajamaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajamaysher|gokishajamaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajamayng|shajamayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajamaynkng|goshajamaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajamayng|gokishajamayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajamaya|shajamaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajamaynkya|goshajamaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajamaya|gokishajamaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajamayam|shajamayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajamaynkyam|goshajamaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajamayam|gokishajamayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamaynĂŒshĂ«|shajamaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshajamaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishajamaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamaynĂŒro|shajamaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamaynknĂŒro|goshajamaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamaynĂŒro|gokishajamaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamaynĂŒmu|shajamaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamaynknĂŒmu|goshajamaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamaynĂŒmu|gokishajamaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamayshĂ«nĂŒ|shajamayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajamaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajamayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamayshĂ«ro|shajamayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamaynkshĂ«ro|goshajamaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamayshĂ«ro|gokishajamayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamayshĂ«mu|shajamayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamaynkshĂ«mu|goshajamaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamayshĂ«mu|gokishajamayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamayronĂŒ|shajamayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamaynkronĂŒ|goshajamaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamayronĂŒ|gokishajamayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamayroshĂ«|shajamayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamaynkroshĂ«|goshajamaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamayroshĂ«|gokishajamayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajamayromu|shajamayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajamaynkromu|goshajamaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajamayromu|gokishajamayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajamaymunĂŒ|shajamaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajamaynkmunĂŒ|goshajamaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajamaymunĂŒ|gokishajamaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajamaymushĂ«|shajamaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajamaynkmushĂ«|goshajamaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajamaymushĂ«|gokishajamaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajamaymuro|shajamaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajamaynkmuro|goshajamaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajamaymuro|gokishajamaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
